title: Multi AI Agent Systems: When One AI Brain Isn’t Enough
summary: The video explores multi-agent systems as a method to improve trust and verification in AI by mitigating hallucinations and other errors in single-agent systems. It demonstrates how practitioners can build safer, more reliable AI in high-stakes applications through distributed agent architectures.
